subcodes.title: Words to H.E.H et al, spoken on 1913-11-03
subcodes.first_line: Today I am going to speak to you on the object of the appearance of the prophets. It is evident that the world of humanity is in need of educators.
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @education of children; moral education, @need for an educator
